content: Hi! I'm Maria, I run support ops at a fintech called Northwind.
Hi Maria, happy to help. What are you working on?
We keep losing context between shifts. By the way I'm severely allergic to penicillin, in case that ever comes up in the medical-claims flow.
Noted. Let's focus on the shift handoff first.
Right. My manager is Ana Restrepo. We ship releases on Fridays and I hate Monday standups.
Got it. So Fridays for releases, and avoid scheduling on Monday mornings.
Exactly. Also, prefer metric units and a terse style in any summary you write me.
That's it, thanks. Nice weather today by the way.
